title: rubus schummelii
intro: Rubus schummelii, also known as Schumel's black raspberry or Schumel's thimbleberry, is a species of thimbleberry native to the southeastern United States. This plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rubus schummelii include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and its leaves, stems, and roots are also used in various herbal preparations.
